overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked dystopian city. The player character moves through neon-lit streets, past a massive illuminated Ferris wheel, under highway overpasses, and through a street market area before entering a dark underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-soaked urban intersection with towering skyscrapers

events.description: begins turning right at intersection, revealing large illuminated Ferris wheel in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking through the wet intersection, turning right toward the Ferris wheel while rain streaks across the view

notable_agents.action: abandoned car sitting stationary in the middle of the rain-soaked intersection

entered.detail: towering futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows rising into the night sky
tall palm trees lining the street, swaying slightly in the rain
tall street lamps casting bright yellow light through the rain and haze
large glowing advertisements and corporate signage on building facades
derelict vehicle sitting in the middle of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a wide urban intersection during a heavy downpour. Towering glass skyscrapers surround the area while neon billboards glow through the haze. The camera moves forward and turns right, revealing a large Ferris wheel in the distance as rain streaks across the lens.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with massive illuminated Ferris wheel attraction

events.description: rain intensifies with heavy vertical streaks becoming more prominent across the screen

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street with the Ferris wheel dominating the right side of the view

entered.detail: massive illuminated Ferris wheel with blue and yellow lighting, partially obscured by palm trees
elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the open street with the massive Ferris wheel now prominent on the right, its lights reflecting off the wet pavement. The rain intensifies as the highway overpass becomes visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching highway overpass with parking structure

events.description: approaching the dark shadow of the highway overpass ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the rain-slicked street toward the overpass, passing by the concrete parking structure

entered.detail: multi-level concrete parking garage with horizontal slits, appearing dark and imposing

segments.scene_description: Moving along the street toward the highway overpass, the Ferris wheel disappears behind as a large concrete parking structure dominates the left side. The overpass looms larger ahead, casting dark shadows on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered area under highway transitioning to open market with food stalls

events.description: enters dark shadow under the highway overpass, significantly reducing visibility
emerges from underpass into market area with bright orange Caliente signage

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass and emerging into a street market area with food stalls and vendors

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near the Caliente food stall under the awning

entered.detail: bright orange neon sign reading 'Caliente' above a food stall
street vendor stalls with awnings and barriers set up along the sidewalk
yellow-topped concrete barriers lining the edge of the market area

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under the dark highway overpass where lighting drops significantly, then emerges into a bustling street market area. The bright orange 'Caliente' sign illuminates food stalls on the right, with NPCs visible near the vendors.

scene_state.functional_zone: street market with food stalls and neon signage

events.description: turns slightly right to navigate around the market stalls and barriers

agents.ego_description: walking past the Caliente market stalls, navigating around barriers while observing the street vendors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking through the rain near the market stalls

entered.detail: Ferris wheel visible again in the far distance through the haze

segments.scene_description: Moving through the market area, the camera passes the Caliente food stall and navigates around concrete barriers. The Ferris wheel becomes visible again in the far distance while pedestrians browse the stalls.

events.description: enters dark tunnel-like underpass with minimal lighting, leaving the market behind

agents.ego_description: walking into the dark underpass, leaving the illuminated market area behind for the shadowy corridor ahead

entered.detail: dark tunnel-like passage under the highway with dim overhead lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dark underpass beneath the highway, leaving the neon-lit market behind. The environment becomes significantly darker with only sparse artificial lighting illuminating the wet concrete path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban intersection that gradually transitions into the oppressive shadow of a highway overpass. It begins amidst towering glass skyscrapers and glowing neon billboards, moving forward and turning right as rain streaks across the lens to reveal a distant, illuminated Ferris wheel. As the camera advances along the open street, the Ferris wheel becomes a prominent fixture on the right with its lights reflecting off the wet pavement, while the rain intensifies. The scene then shifts as the Ferris wheel disappears behind the camera and a massive concrete parking structure dominates the left, before finally approaching the looming highway overpass that casts deep shadows across the road.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark highway overpass through a vibrant neon market and back into a shadowed underpass. It begins by emerging from the gloom of the overpass into a bustling street market, where the bright orange glow of a Caliente sign illuminates food stalls and nearby pedestrians. As the camera navigates past the vendors and around concrete barriers, the environment opens up to reveal a massive Ferris wheel looming in the far distance. The scene then shifts as the camera leaves the neon lights behind, moving away from the market crowds and entering a dark underpass. Finally, the surroundings fade into deep shadow, leaving only sparse artificial lighting to reflect off the wet concrete path ahead.
